title: TreeMiner
description: A plugin which mines the whole tree for you with geyserMC support
body:
![TreeMiner Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792530045e90eff28754b6ea03d966372cc811c3.png)
Advertisement:

text version TreeMiner Plugin: Enhanced Woodcutting Experience TreeMiner is an intuitive and performance-optimized Minecraft plugin that transforms the way players gather wood. With a single swing of your axe, you can fell an entire tree in one swift motion, eliminating the tedious process of chopping each log individually. Key Features: Connected Log Detection - Automatically identifies and harvests all logs connected to the initially broken block, regardless of wood type (oak, spruce, acacia, etc.) Smart Configuration Options: Toggle sneak requirement for activation Tool type restrictions (axe only mode) Permission-based access control Configurable maximum log count to prevent server lag Balanced Gameplay: Optional tool durability consumption based on logs harvested Preserves vanilla drop rates and enchantment effects Compatible with other economy and crafting plugins User-Friendly Commands: Simple /treeminer or /tm toggle command Personal preference settings that persist between sessions Server Performance Optimized: Efficient breadth-first search algorithm for log detection Minimal impact on server TPS Asynchronous block breaking for smooth gameplay Why Choose This Plugin? This wood harvesting solution strikes the perfect balance between convenience and gameplay integrity. It respects Minecraft's core mechanics while eliminating repetitive tasks that can lead to player fatigue and wrist strain. Server administrators will appreciate the lightweight implementation and extensive configuration options, while players will enjoy the seamless integration that feels like a natural extension of vanilla gameplay rather than a game-changing modification. Whether you're building a survival server focused on construction or simply want to enhance the quality of life for your players, TreeMiner provides an elegant solution to a common gameplay friction point without compromising the core woodcutting experience.
